goal: Carry persistent harness adapter, validation, and review-debt context across Tanchiki2 development sessions.
scope: Persistent adapter memory for project context, Review Warden policy, known Codex review debt, validation requirements, and closeout state.
non_goals: Do not fix game review debt in the I3 adapter package unless the adapter itself requires it.
Do not deploy or change production settings.
Do not add secrets or change branch protection.
Do not treat memory as authority over Git artifacts, review approval, validation, closeout, or merge authority.

roadmap.status: Review Warden blocking debt repaired in code with regression tests
production closeout proof recorded without deployment or publish authority
Deep Agents stub-runtime polish planning package in progress

attended_v2_lifecycle_telemetry.run_command: verify urkrass/agentic-harness refs/heads/codex/mar-693-empty-base resolves to 69df33aafbe6f2738b87419d449fd3ee4f84f018, then gh workflow run langsmith-trace-smoke.yml --repo urkrass/agentic-harness --ref codex/mar-693-empty-base -f project=agentic-harness-dev -f target=attended-v2-lifecycle
